name: @alehandrosv/esmeralda-cli
description: CLI for Jade ORM - a modern ORM for Lua

scripts.build:standalone: npm run build && pkg dist/bin/esmeralda.js --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64 --output dist/esmeralda
scripts.build:standalone:win: npm run build && pkg dist/bin/esmeralda.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/esmeralda.exe
scripts.build:standalone:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/bin/esmeralda.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/esmeralda-linux
scripts.build:standalone:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/bin/esmeralda.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output dist/esmeralda-mac

author: AlehandroSV
